titleStmt.title: SII 34.80: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 80. Kāmarasavalli, Udaiyarpalayam Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the north wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Kārkōṭakēśvara temple.

summary.p: This is incomplete and records that the mahāsabhā of the village decided to give some land in exchange for another tax-free land that they had given for archanābhōga earlier as it was found difficult to cultivate due to lack of proper irrigation. The transaction took place in the presence of the nāḍu officer Veṅkāḍaṉ Paṇḍaraṅgamuḍaiyāṉ alias Neṟiyuḍaichchōḻa-Pallavarāyar of Marudāḍu in Veṅkuṉṟa-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
pūmātu puṇarap puvimātu vaḷara nāmātu viḷaṅka jēyamātu virumpa tan tiruppatu malar mannavar cūṭa maṉniya Urimaiyāl maṇimuṭicūṭi ceṅkōl cenṟu ticaitoṟum vaḷarppa veṅkali nīṅki meyyāṟan taḻaippa kaliṅkamiriyak kaṭal malai naṭātti vaḷaṅkoḷḷāḻi varaiyāḻi naṭātti Irucuṭaraḷavum Orukuṭai niḻaṟkīḻ cempon siṅṅāsanattu tiripuvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷōṭum cakkaravattikaḷ śrī vikkiramacōḻa tēvaṟku yāṇṭu 10 4 Āvatu vaṭakarai vikkirama cōḻa vaḷanāṭṭu viṟaikkūṟṟattu brahmadeyam śrīkāmavalli
saturvetimaṅkalattu peruṅkuṟi mahāsabhaiyōm Ivūrt tirukkālkkōṭīsvaramuṭaiyār kōyilil tiruveṭuttukkaṭṭiyilē kūṭṭaṅ kuṟaivaṟa kūṭi Iruntu Ināṭu cēkiṟa (jekiṟa) jeyaṅkoṇṭa cōḻamaṇṭalattu veṇkuṉṟakkōṭṭattu marutāṭu nāṭṭu vituṟur kōmuḻān veṇkāṭaṉ paṇṭaraṅkamuṭaiyānāna neṟiyuṭaiccōḻap pallavarāyarum kūṭavirukka sabhāvyavasdhai paṇṇiṉa paricāvatu Uṭai ku nāṅkaḷ muṉpu Arcanābhogattukku kācukoḷḷā Iṟaiyiliyāka marutāntaka nallūr nāṅkaḷ viṭṭuk kal veṭṭina nilattil cōḻa
mātēvikkuk kiḻakku tiruvāruri vākkālukku tekku 2 kaṇṇāṟṟu 1 ccatirantu vākkālin kīḻ karaittuṇṭattu 5 10� vum 2 catirattu vaṭakkaṭaiya � vil mēkkaṭaiya �stam tekkaṭaiya � li mēkkaṭaiya � vum Itan kiḻakku � 2 mā nīkki teṉkiḻakku � vum mūṉṟāñ catirattu tekkaṭaiya � vil mēkkaṭaiya 3 � 2 mā vum 3 nṟāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu 2 raṇṭāñcatirattu tekkaṭaiya � mā ṭakkaṭaiya � lil mēkkaṭaiya � 1 kāṇi m tenkiḻakku � vum Ākap pala taṭiyāl � 10 6 � Iṉ nilam patiṉ Aṟumāvaraiyum nīrpūci nel
viḷaiyāmaiyil Innilam tavira rā[ jarakṣat] tukku naṉṟāka pūjaikoṇṭaruḷa In nilattukku talaimāṟu paṇippaṇiyālp paṇittu sabhāvyasthai cētu Innilattukku yum taṟayilē viṭṭa nilam Āvatu [śrī]kōtaṇṭarāmap peruvākkā nārayaṇavatikku kiḻakku A vvākkālukku teṟku 3 kaṇṇāṟṟu 4 catirattu tekkaṭaiya � vil mēkkaṭaiya � nīkki tenkiḻakku Āti mēkkaṭaiya � nīkki Itin kiḻakku � l vaṭakkaṭaiy � vil mēkkaṭaiya � nīkki Itan kiḻakku mēlppaṭiyāna � 4 kaṇṇāṟṟu
Digital edition of SII 34.80 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
